channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-16970] conf-sanity: test_32f failed with 1
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Arshad <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/0cd561a4-7f00-45db-9715-e4a0ad7a2644

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/96364 - 4.18.0-477.15.1.el8_8.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/96364 - 4.18.0-477.15.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

Quota feature is already enabled.
== enable ost2 project quota ==
CMD: onyx-108vm4 tune2fs -O project /tmp/t32/ost2
tune2fs 1.47.0-wc3 (22-Jun-2023)
CMD: onyx-108vm4 mount -t lustre -onomgs -oloop,mgsnode=10.240.28.227@tcp,writeconf /tmp/t32/ost /tmp/t32/mnt/ost
onyx-108vm4: mount.lustre: mount /dev/loop2 at /tmp/t32/mnt/ost failed: Device or resource busy
onyx-108vm4: Is the backend filesystem mounted?
onyx-108vm4: Check /etc/mtab and /proc/mounts
pdsh@onyx-108vm1: onyx-108vm4: ssh exited with exit code 16
conf-sanity test_32f: @@@@@@ FAIL: Mounting the OST
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6638:error_noexit()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/conf-sanity.sh:2201:t32_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/conf-sanity.sh:2974:test_32f()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6995:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7044:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6881:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/conf-sanity.sh:2979:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-2/2023-07-20/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-3_96364_5_89dd19f6-a25d-422f-a092-9cfca11371df//conf-sanity.test_32f.*.1689823894.log
CMD: onyx-108vm1.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-108vm2,onyx-108vm3,onyx-108vm4,onyx-108vm5 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-2/2023-07-20/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-3_96364_5_89dd19f6-a25d-422f-a092-9cfca11371df//conf-sanity.test_32f.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1689823894.log;
dmesg > /autotest/autotest-2/2023-07-20/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-3_96364_5_89dd19f6-a25d-422f-a092-9cfca11371df//conf-sanity.test_32f.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1689823894.log
== cleanup with rc=0 ==
CMD: onyx-108vm4 umount -d /tmp/t32/mnt/mdt
CMD: onyx-108vm4 umount -d /tmp/t32/mnt/mdt1
CMD: onyx-108vm4 rm -rf /tmp/t32
conf-sanity test_32f: @@@@@@ FAIL: test_32f failed with 1
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6655:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6995:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7044:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6881:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/conf-sanity.sh:2979:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-2/2023-07-20/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-3_96364_5_89dd19f6-a25d-422f-a092-9cfca11371df//conf-sanity.test_32f.*.1689823899.log
CMD: onyx-108vm1.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-108vm2,onyx-108vm3,onyx-108vm4,onyx-108vm5 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-2/2023-07-20/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-3_96364_5_89dd19f6-a25d-422f-a092-9cfca11371df//conf-sanity.test_32f.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1689823899.log;
dmesg > /autotest/autotest-2/2023-07-20/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-3_96364_5_89dd19f6-a25d-422f-a092-9cfca11371df//conf-sanity.test_32f.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1689823899.log

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment: This might relate to LU-16954
